title: Private Parts in EoE
wikitext:
[]: Private Parts in EoE !             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Oct 26, 2004 10:24 pm Well, first i have to tell you that i have a very low quality ogm version of EoE, so only now i noticed this stuff. I watched a better version and i found this weird thing: Am i crazy, or is that a... :? And in this scene also: Am i the last person to notice this? :roll: PLEASE TELL ME !!! :?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Oct 26, 2004 10:28 pm Well...I never REALLY thought of it....but yea...your got something alright.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 26, 2004 10:36 pm It does resemble female genetalia, and I would say you're either blind or innocent if you don't see it. Why? 1) To fuck with your head. 2) Penetration.

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Tue Oct 26, 2004 10:53 pm Also the souls of the Lillim seem to form a vague-looking phallic-symbol that drains into the vaginal slits in the hands of Lillith in one scene right before the Tree of Life containing Unit 01 with Shinji falls through the vaginal slit in her forehead. The symbolism is pretty obvious. The souls of the Lillim are like sperm that fill and impregnate Lillith. It's very much a return to the womb similar to the return to the womb that Shinji and Asuka experience when they are inside their Evas, because of course the soul of their mothers are inside the cores of their Evas. Evangelion has quite a lot of maternal symbolism. Remember in episode 14, Rei's Poem, when Rei describes herself as a woman who does not bleed? That means she's sterile. In my opinion the blood that spurts from her jugular and scars the moon symbolizes the gift of fertility that has been given to her by her merging with her other half. The moon is normally barren and desolate, like Rei was before she returned to Lillith, but then it is scarred with blood, the fluid of life. Of course the moon is always associated with the menstrual cycle, pregnancy, change, and mystery. Just refer to Yoshitoshi ABe's masterpiece Haibane Renmei for another example of the full moon being used as symbolism in anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Oct 26, 2004 11:12 pm Never made that connection until now. *Opens mouth* Uh... *Closes mouth* Hm...

[]:             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Wed Oct 27, 2004 1:06 am Wow Gilgamesh! While I noticed the Vagina like opening the second time I watched the movie (the first time I was just to freaked out to note a lot of details) I didn't make that Rei/fertility or lack therof connection until now. If you'll pardon me, I need to go back and watch the series and movies again to solidify it in my mind.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Oct 27, 2004 8:51 am i never assumed that it was supposed to be genitalia...then again, i have only seen it 3 times... and i agree with gilgamesh's hypothesis/interpretation... and it makes sense the way he says it... which reminds me of when an artist came to our school and showed us all the plates she made...of femal genitals colored like flowers...it was weird...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Oct 27, 2004 10:15 am This i noticed on my first watching of the movie. My thoughs are ether the penatration bit already suggested or Anno was >bad pun alert< screwing with use >drum beat<

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Oct 27, 2004 1:05 pm That's not the only time we see that in Evangelion . Check out the shape of Unit-01's eye in Ep. 2. Also, the shape of NERV headquarters is rather suggestive.

[]:             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Wed Oct 27, 2004 1:57 pm And I'm sure everybody caught the suggestive shape of the playground young Shinji is in during third impact in EOE.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Oct 27, 2004 2:04 pm I don't feel your examples are suggestive in the least, thewayneiac. Those just look like normal designs to me, and any resemblence to genetalia is merely the working of teenage minds. The movie, however, is a totally different story.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Wed Oct 27, 2004 4:37 pm Olin of Xephon wrote: And I'm sure everybody caught the suggestive shape of the playground young Shinji is in during third impact in EOE.

[]:             Quote Post by TheUserName » Wed Oct 27, 2004 5:41 pm In EOE, where we see the scenario where Shinji is building the sand castle in the playground, accompanied by the two dolls, there is some very suggestive imagery present. I can't provide screencaps, but If you remember back, there were two hills side by side one another, both in the shape of breasts. The sandpit that Shinji is playing in, some way directly below these two hills, is similar to the shape of the NERV Headquaters(vagina shaped).

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Oct 27, 2004 5:42 pm (thought) no wonder i always got turned on on that part (end thought) Damn! Never thought of that?! I always knew it ment something! That Anno has to be a freaking genuis. I bet 20 years from now there will be people still finding stuff on this show?!

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Wed Oct 27, 2004 6:22 pm TheUserName wrote: In EOE, where we see the scenario where Shinji is building the sand castle in the playground, accompanied by the two dolls, there is some very suggestive imagery present. I can't provide screencaps, but If you remember back, there were two hills side by side one another, both in the shape of breasts. The sandpit that Shinji is playing in, some way directly below these two hills, is similar to the shape of the NERV Headquaters(vagina shaped).

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Oct 27, 2004 6:50 pm I never noticed that. You people will be the end of me>lol

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Oct 27, 2004 6:54 pm We've had a thread on that scene already.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Oct 27, 2004 9:02 pm Dave wrote: I don't feel your examples are suggestive in the least, thewayneiac. Those just look like normal designs to me, and any resemblence to genetalia is merely the working of teenage minds. The movie, however, is a totally different story.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Oct 27, 2004 11:01 pm well...there was that thing in the davinci code about masculine and femenine being the triangles...so that could be why... and they eye...it was weird.. i think the person leaving is Shinji...him observing himself...

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Oct 27, 2004 11:15 pm The eye just looks like a slit to me. Remember, Unit 01 formed that eye on the spot, and it had to break free of the skin somehow. I don't see any significant resemblence to female genetalia.
